NOTES: Physical cash; shekel and foreign currency
ILS and foreign currency accounts; NIS = Israeli New Shekel
Depreciation: 15% per year (accelerated depreciation for leased vehicles)
Israeli GAAP: carried at equity or cost
Israeli GAAP: goodwill amortized (unlike IFRS 3); IFRS adopters test for impairment
Standard VAT 17%; reduced 0% for certain exports
TDS from employees; remitted to ITA monthly
OCI under IAS 21 for foreign subsidiaries
IAS 38: R→expense; D→capitalize if criteria met; hi-tech sector critical
